issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing configuration files or invalid task definitions.
The skill lacks runnable code snippets or detailed step-by-step procedures that can be directly executed by users.

scenarios.name: Configure turbo.json so building @app/web first builds workspace deps and caches output
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses dependsOn:['build'] (non-topological) and skips outputs; treatment uses dependsOn:['^build'] with the topological prefix, declares outputs:['.next/**','dist/**'], and sets empty outputs:[] for lint.

scenarios.name: Create a minimal Docker context for deploying just @app/api
scenarios.rationale: Baseline COPYs the whole monorepo into the image and installs everything; treatment uses turbo prune --scope=@app/api in a pruner stage so only the targeted package and its dependencies enter the Docker context.
